sub_pixel_system.notes: FPS with true-3D graphics; sub-pixel precision not documented

special_mechanics.name: Six Degrees of Freedom (6DOF)
special_mechanics.description: Player pilots a spaceship through 3D mines with unrestricted rotational and translational movement in all axes. Not bound to traditional ground-based movement.

special_mechanics.name: Spaceship Energy System
special_mechanics.description: Shields function as health (max 200 units). Energy powers weapons (max 200 units). Energy recharged at stations to 100 units.

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Systems
special_mechanics.description: Primary weapons (lasers, spreadfire, fusion) consume energy. Secondary weapons include missiles and proximity bombs. Quad laser modification available.

special_mechanics.name: Power-up System
special_mechanics.description: Collectible items scattered or dropped by robots. Include cloaking devices, invulnerability, weapon modifications, shield/energy restoration.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Game is FPS with 6DOF space flight mechanics. No specific movement parameter values documented in sources. Gameplay emphasizes piloting freedom and 3D navigation rather than precise platforming physics. Sources contain gameplay description but lack quantitative physics parameters typical of platformers.
